title: Diasperus glaucescens
taxonomy: Diasperus glaucescens is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Phytolaccaceae. It is a member of the order Caryophyllales, a group of flowering plants that also includes the carnation and the cacti. The plant is native to South America and is part of the genus Diasperus. Further classification of Diasperus glaucescens includes its kingdom as Plantae and its phylum as Angiospermophyta. The plant's classification is based on its morphology and genetic characteristics.
